design_philosophy: Duolingo-inspired simplicity mixed with startup quality. The app must feel tactile, highly encouraging, and strictly native (Expo). Gamification is at the core, utilizing 'chunky' 3D-like buttons and cards with thick bottom borders, ample whitespace, and neon accents.

typography.font_family_recommendation: Nunito (via expo-google-fonts) or System sans-serif with tight tracking

buttons.primary: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#00D1FF', borderRadius: 16, borderBottomWidth: 4, borderBottomColor: '#009BCC', paddingVertical: 16, alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }
buttons.secondary: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, borderWidth: 2, borderColor: '#E5E5EA', borderBottomWidth: 4, paddingVertical: 16, alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }
buttons.interaction: Use activeOpacity={0.8} on TouchableOpacity. To simulate depth press, visually translate Y +2 and reduce borderBottomWidth to 2 on press (optional if using Animated).

cards.default: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 20, borderWidth: 2, borderColor: '#E5E5EA', borderBottomWidth: 4, padding: 20 }
cards.premium: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 20, borderWidth: 2, borderColor: '#7B61FF', shadowColor: '#7B61FF', shadowOpacity: 0.2, shadowRadius: 12, elevation: 5, padding: 20 }

inputs.text_input: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#F4F5F9', borderRadius: 16, borderWidth: 2, borderColor: '#E5E5EA', padding: 16, fontSize: 16, color: '#1A1A24', fontWeight: '600' }

progress_bars.track: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#E5E5EA', borderRadius: 10, height: 16, overflow: 'hidden' }
progress_bars.fill: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#00FF9D', borderRadius: 10, height: '100%' }

bottom_tabs.container: React Native StyleSheet: { backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF', borderTopWidth: 2, borderTopColor: '#E5E5EA', paddingBottom: 24, paddingTop: 12 }

layout_and_navigation.safe_area: MANDATORY: Wrap screens in SafeAreaView to prevent notch overlaps.
layout_and_navigation.keyboard_handling: MANDATORY: Use KeyboardAvoidingView (behavior='padding' on iOS) for screens with text inputs.
layout_and_navigation.exam_header: Layout: Left (Close 'X' icon), Center (Progress Bar, flex: 1), Right (Lives/Heart icon or Timer).

media_and_icons.icon_library: @expo/vector-icons (Feather for clean UI, Ionicons for standard native feel)

mascot_kangaroo.description: Friendly modern kangaroo mascot holding a tablet. Use in Onboarding, Empty States, and as the avatar for the AI Tutor Chat.

australian_study_background.description: Minimalist Australian study motif background. Use for Home Dashboard headers or Subscription Paywall background.

achievement_badge.description: 3D glowing achievement badge. Use in Analytics screen, Exam Results screen, or when maintaining a long streak.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a testing attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
testing_attributes.react_native_implementation: In React Native, use the `testID` prop instead of `data-testid`. (e.g., `<TouchableOpacity testID="login-button">`)

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL DOMAIN: This is exclusively an Expo React Native mobile app.
CRITICAL CONSTRAINT 1: DO NOT use HTML elements (div, span, p). Use ONLY View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, Image, ScrollView, etc.
CRITICAL CONSTRAINT 2: DO NOT use Tailwind CSS or className attributes. Use strictly the `StyleSheet.create({})` API.
CRITICAL CONSTRAINT 3: DO NOT use web-only libraries.

DESIGN EXECUTION: Apply Duolingo-style 'chunky' aesthetics. Buttons and cards MUST have thick borders (`borderBottomWidth: 4`, `borderRadius: 16-20`, `borderWidth: 2`) to give a physical, tactile feel.

COMPONENTS: Build the UI using clean, declarative native components. For complex interactions like swipeable flashcards, use React Native's PanResponder or third-party native-compatible gesture libraries if instructed, else build simplified native taps.

PAGES REQUIRED: Onboarding Carousel, Login/Signup, Dashboard (Streaks/XP), Exam Selection, Question Screen, Exam Results, AI Tutor Chat, Flashcards Deck, Analytics Charts, Subscription Paywall, Profile & Settings.
STYLING TRICKS: Use `elevation` for Android shadows and `shadowColor/Offset/Opacity` for iOS shadows if depth is needed beyond the thick borders.
Make the UI highly responsive to device sizes by utilizing flexbox generously.
